scenario_scope: Coordinated intake and structural adjudication for perception, embodiment, human-AI organizations, multi-agent dynamics, inner alignment, causal reasoning, uncertainty, scaling and emergence, instrumental convergence, RAG, artificial moral status, and decision theory.

cases.decision_rationale: World Models owns belief construction after observation admission; perception separately owns provenance, timing, calibration, corruption, fusion disagreement, and degradation before an observation enters state.
required_before_drafting: completed birth atom and reader handoff
non_claims: does not establish calibrated sensor truth
does not reproduce external robustness results

cases.decision_rationale: Computational runtime does not own dynamics, deadlines, independent safety controllers, actuator faults, physical effect limits, or recovery from irreversible interaction.
required_before_drafting: completed birth atom and reader handoff
evidence_transition_preconditions: matched learned and conventional control baselines
promotion_blockers: no local physical or high-fidelity campaign
non_claims: does not establish universal control invariance

cases.decision_rationale: Human factors owns operator performance; organizational design separately owns authority allocation, review burden, liability, skill, participation, incentives, and institutional learning.
required_before_drafting: completed birth atom and reader handoff
evidence_transition_preconditions: decision, burden, learning, and incident outcomes
non_claims: does not establish an optimal organization

cases.decision_rationale: Inter-stack protocols own valid exchange; multi-agent dynamics owns incentives, commitments, collusion, coalitions, equilibria, correlated failure, and population-level effects.
required_before_drafting: completed birth atom and reader handoff
promotion_blockers: no general cooperation or collusion result
non_claims: does not endorse one universal decision theory

cases.decision_rationale: Adversarial evaluation owns tests of behavior; inner alignment owns the defeasible case about learned objectives, mesa-optimization, misgeneralization, persistence, and change monitoring.
required_before_drafting: completed birth atom and reader handoff
non_claims: does not infer objectives from behavior alone
does not establish naturally learned deception

cases.decision_rationale: Causal reasoning and uncertainty modify World Models; scaling and emergence modify Efficient ASI; instrumental convergence modifies Failure Modes; RAG modifies Virtual Context ABI; artificial moral status modifies Moral Uncertainty; decision theory modifies Multi-Agent Dynamics. None creates an independent stack boundary.
promotion_blockers: literature integration is not local evidence
no section-level evidence campaign was executed
non_claims: does not create seven additional chapters
does not promote any chapter core

validation_boundary: Records five distinct-owner admissions and seven existing-owner integrations. It does not validate any mechanism, reproduce any source result, promote support, close P2, or authorize further structural growth.
non_claims: does not create empirical, formal, replicated, deployed, or SOTA support
does not close historical Round 16 debt
does not keep the structural-admission window open after this transaction
